title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Packet Lens: Net Rpo Rto
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net rpo rto increment in a tested network continuity plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.
Use scheduled or ad hoc discovery, port mirroring, and traffic, performance, availability, and configuration monitoring.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Build Net Rpo Rto evidence
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-rpo-rto-13lmes" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Rpo Rto into observable performance evidence.
